text.title: Adobe Firefly Integration Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying adobe-firefly-integration. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline relies on a designer running a desktop plugin nightly; misses 3 of 7 nights.
antipattern.fix: Move to REST; remove the human-in-the-keyboard step.

antipattern.symptom: Off-brand output ships to the homepage; takedown + retraction required.
Legal cannot prove commercial-safe; insurance denies claim.
antipattern.fix: Persist prompt hash + model version + Content Credentials per asset.

antipattern.symptom: Team swaps to a fine-tuned model; loses Adobe IP indemnity unknowingly.
antipattern.fix: Pin pipeline to firefly-image-v3+; fail closed on unknown model.
